title: {{title}}

goal.description: Short user-visible goal for the slice

routes_in_scope.description: Comma-separated routes or UI surfaces in scope

shared_contracts.description: Shared shells, rails, renderers, or contracts affected

design_refs.description: Named design references checked for this slice

non_goals.description: Explicit non-goals and preserved runtime seams
non_goals.default: No backend architecture changes. Preserve existing typed runtime seams unless separately scoped.

manual_validation.description: Human validation matrix for touched routes
manual_validation.default: Canonical desktop viewport, fresh thread, existing thread, realistic success case, and long-content or raw-tool-output stress case.

automated_validation.default: make tidy; make ui-test-e2e-real-ui-smoke when agent-page behavior changes; targeted Vitest and Playwright coverage for touched surfaces.

steps.title: Lock route matrix, deferred routes, and non-goals for {{title}}
steps.description:
Goal:
- Make route coverage honest before implementation starts.

Scope:
- name touched routes
- name deferred routes
- name shared contracts affected
- name design references and required states

Acceptance Criteria:
- The epic description is updated with routes in scope, routes deferred, design references, non-goals, and validation expectations.
- Shared-shell versus route-local scope is explicit.
- Follow-up slices are split or superseded instead of duplicated.

steps.title: Implement the shared contract and route slices for {{title}}
steps.description:
Goal:
- Land the actual frontend behavior and visual work without blurring shared-contract changes and route-local changes.

Scope:
- shared shell or shared contract work first
- route-local implementation after the shared contract is stable
- preserve existing runtime seams unless separately scoped

Acceptance Criteria:
- Empty, loading, success, long-content, and error states are reviewed on every touched route.
- Long raw payloads and narrow-column stress cases stay contained.
- Defer untouched routes explicitly instead of implying parity.

steps.title: Validate, update docs, and sync PR reporting for {{title}}
steps.description:
Goal:
- Make the shipped slice reviewable and hard to misread.

Scope:
- update AGENTS or local UI guidance if rules changed
- update PR description with covered routes, deferred routes, and validation
- capture remaining risks and follow-up tasks

Acceptance Criteria:
- Required automated checks pass on final branch state.
- PR description lists routes covered, routes deferred, design references, validation, and remaining risks.
- Related Beads tasks are updated only after final branch-state validation.
